campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 19, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to discuss staffing vacancies and how the city is working to recruit and retain employees. The council also addressed housing security issues and confirmed that the Boogie Festival is happening this weekend.
keyTopics: City staffing vacancies and recruitment/retention efforts
Housing security concerns
Boogie Festival this weekend

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — May 20, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council adopted a resolution to identify certain properties in Saratoga and scheduled a public hearing for June 17, 2026, where residents can voice objections before the council makes a final decision on the matter.
keyTopics: Resolution passed to identify specific properties
Public hearing scheduled for June 17, 2026
Residents can submit protests before final approval

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — June 2, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on June 2, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, confirm a new youth commissioner, and set up the November 2026 municipal election for three council seats. The council also approved development plans, signed service agreements with software and building inspection vendors, and authorized the town manager to handle various contract renewals and amendments.
keyTopics: November 3, 2026 general municipal election scheduled for three council seats
New youth commissioner appointment confirmed by selection committee
Final development map approved for Tract 10675 Boulevard project
Five-year software agreement authorized with Accela, Inc.
Building division plan check service agreements authorized

san-jose.title: San José City Council — June 10, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting on June 10, 2026 to prepare for upcoming council sessions. They reviewed and organized agenda items for two upcoming meetings (June 16 and June 23), deciding what items to add and whether any discussions needed specific time slots scheduled.
keyTopics: Final agenda planning for June 16 council meeting
Draft agenda preparation for June 23 council meeting
Community and Economic Development Committee work plan discussion

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — June 9, 2026
mountain-view.summary: Mountain View's City Council met on June 9, 2026, to handle personnel business and celebrate two important observances. The council held a closed-door session to discuss hiring a new City Attorney, then moved to public session to adopt proclamations honoring Pride Month and Juneteenth.
keyTopics: City Attorney appointment (discussed in closed session)
Pride Month Proclamation
Juneteenth Proclamation

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — June 16, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held two back-to-back meetings on June 16, 2026: a closed-door session (details not disclosed to the public) followed by a study session where council members reviewed the Community Equity Assessment, which appears to be an analysis of fairness and inclusion across city services and programs.
keyTopics: Community Equity Assessment update and findings
Closed session discussion

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — June 16, 2026
cupertino.summary: The City Council held a study session to review how parks and recreational facilities are currently zoned and designated in Cupertino, and to make sure the city's rules match state law protections for these spaces. The meeting also included time for residents to speak about any city issues they wanted to bring up.
keyTopics: Review of existing zoning for parks and recreational facilities
Corrections needed to align local designations with state law
Protection of parkland sites across the city
Public comment period on non-agenda items

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — June 1, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara's City Council held a Stadium Neighborhood Relations Ad Hoc Subcommittee meeting on June 1, 2026. The meeting was held in person, with options for residents to join remotely via Zoom or phone.
keyTopics: Stadium neighborhood relations updates
In-person and remote participation options available
Public comment submission deadline (10 a.m. day before meeting)

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 7, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council met to approve routine administrative items and discuss updates to the city's federal housing and community development funding plan for 2025-2026. The council also reviewed requests from individual members for new projects to study and made changes to rules about how council vacancies are filled.
keyTopics: Updated the 2025-2030 housing and community development funding plan
Changed the council vacancy process (reduced certain requirements)
Reviewed new project requests from individual council members
Approved previous meeting minutes and confirmed upcoming meeting schedule

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — April 28, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council met to discuss updates from various departments and committees, with major focus on improvements to the Foothills Nature Preserve, the future of the middle school athletics program, and the Parks and Recreation Commission's work plan for the coming year.
keyTopics: Foothills Nature Preserve Improvements Project
Middle school athletics program management and direction
Parks and Recreation Commission fiscal year 2027 work plan
Department and liaison committee updates
